code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut seen = " "
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let needle = " #{token} "
      if not string.contains(seen, needle)
        seen = "#{seen}#{token} "
        count = count + 1
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  let needle = " #{token} "
  if not string.contains(seen, needle)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
